name: Cocoa extract
summary: Cocoa extract is normalized for the COSMOS epigenetic-clock trial context where cocoa was tested alongside a multivitamin arm.
mechanism_summary: Represents a polyphenol-rich supplement exposure evaluated against DNA-methylation clock endpoints in a large supplement trial context.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: COSMOS multivitamin cocoa epigenetic-clock trial; COSMOS multivitamin modestly slowed selected epigenetic clocks while cocoa was null.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
